scripts.dev: pnpm exec tsx scripts/sync-manifest.ts && vite build --watch
scripts.build: pnpm exec tsx scripts/sync-manifest.ts && vite build
scripts.lint: pnpm build && pnpm dlx --allow-build=spawn-sync web-ext lint --source-dir dist
scripts.xpi: pnpm build && pnpm dlx --allow-build=spawn-sync web-ext build --source-dir dist --artifacts-dir . --filename schulnetz-plus-{version}.xpi --overwrite-dest
scripts.publish:firefox: sh -c 'set -a; . ./.env; set +a; pnpm build && git archive --format zip --output source.zip HEAD && pnpm dlx --allow-build=spawn-sync web-ext@8 sign --source-dir dist --channel listed --amo-metadata .github/amo-metadata.json --upload-source-code source.zip --approval-timeout 0 --api-key "$JWT_USER" --api-secret "$JWT_SECRET"'
